summary: Frontend testing of Home screen notification bell fix, Action Items navigation fix, and Contact page task banner feature. All 8 features working correctly.

notification_bell_dropdown.description: NotificationBell.tsx uses Modal component instead of position:fixed - dropdown renders ON TOP of quick action tiles

action_items_with_contact_id.description: Clicking task with contact_id navigates to /contact/{id} with prefill, channel, taskId, taskTitle params

action_items_without_contact_id.description: Clicking task WITHOUT contact_id navigates to /tasks page (fallback behavior)

contact_task_banner_sms.description: Contact page shows blue TASK banner with task title and 'Send below ↓' hint when arriving from task

contact_task_banner_email.description: Contact page auto-opens Email composer when channel=email is passed

quick_action_tiles_contact_picker.description: Home screen quick action tiles (Share My Card, Review Link, Send a Card, My Showcase) open contact picker modal
verified: Share My Card opens contact picker
'Select a contact to send to' text visible

features_verified: PASS: Notification bell dropdown renders ON TOP of quick action tiles (uses Modal component at body level)
PASS: Action Item task with contact_id navigates to /contact/{contactId} with prefill, taskTitle, taskId params
PASS: Action Item task WITHOUT contact_id navigates to /tasks page (fallback)
PASS: Contact page shows blue TASK banner at top when arriving with taskTitle query param
PASS: Contact page auto-opens SMS composer with prefilled message when arriving from task with prefill param
PASS: Contact page auto-opens Email composer when channel=email is passed
PASS: Task banner shows task title and 'Send below' hint arrow pointing to composer
PASS: Home screen quick action tiles (Share My Card, Review Link) open contact picker modal
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.tsx line 173: Modal component correctly wraps the dropdown - fixes z-index stacking context issue
home.tsx lines 629-643: Action Items onPress correctly passes taskId, taskTitle, prefill, channel params
home.tsx line 640-643: Handles tasks without contact_id by navigating to /tasks page
[id].tsx line 290: taskTitle param correctly read from useLocalSearchParams
[id].tsx lines 420-428: useEffect populates composer with prefill and sets channel mode when taskId is present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three fixes verified: 1) NotificationBell now uses Modal component for z-index fix, 2) Action Items correctly navigate to contact page with task params or /tasks fallback, 3) Contact page shows task banner and auto-opens composer with prefilled message. All quick action tiles on home screen open contact picker modal as expected from iteration_121.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered
